description: Meta-analysis of features confirmed to exist on club websites (via Reddit, forums, vendor blogs, official pages) but NOT on the homepage. These are 'site-wide' features that live in subpages, apps, or subdomains.

podcast_audio.note: Widely adopted but hosted on dedicated podcast pages or platforms, never on homepage

interactive_fan_poll.note: Goal of the Month, Player of the Week, Driver of the Day votes — all on subpages or subdomains, not homepage

loyalty_rewards.note: Socios fan tokens (9 clubs), ticket loyalty points (Chelsea), NBA ID, MLB Ballpark Rewards, MotoGP Fan Club XP

quiz_trivia.note: Dedicated quiz sections on club websites, never surfaced on homepage

push_notification_opt_in.note: WonderPush confirmed as vendor for these 6 clubs. Browser push prompt appears on first visit but is easily dismissed/blocked

womens_team_tickets.note: Dedicated women's ticketing pages exist as subpages under /tickets/, not on homepage

wallpapers_downloads.note: Dedicated wallpaper/download pages in fans sections

draws_contests.note: Membership prize draws, fan zone sweepstakes, quiz prizes — all in subpages

multi_sport_tickets.note: Real Madrid basketball tickets, Barcelona basketball + handball tickets on dedicated subpages

predictor_fantasy.note: Only leagues/governing bodies run official predictor/fantasy games, not individual clubs

hospitality_block.note: Nearly universal but on separate subdomains (hospitality.arsenal.com, etc.), never a homepage block

ai_chat_assistant.note: Arsenal (Messenger bot), Barcelona (Discord bot), Premier League (Copilot) exist but none on website homepage. True 0% for homepage.
